Include the following in your description: the role of RNA polymerase, the role of the promoter, and the role of the terminator.
Describe how DNA is transcribed into RNA in a cell. Include the following in your description: the role of RNA polymerase, the role of the promoter, and the role of the terminator.
Transcription is the process of copying a gene’s DNA sequence to make an RNA molecule. The cell uses the information in the RNA molecule to make a protein. Transcription is the first step in gene expression. The process of transcription is similar to DNA replication, but there are some important differences.
